data.title: S&P Global raises dividend by 1% to $0.97 per share amid spin-off, effective Jan 14, 2026.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, the Board of Directors of S&P Global (NYSE: SPGI) announced a 1.0% rise in the regular quarterly cash dividend for the Company's common stock. The increase factors in the anticipated spin of S&P Global's Mobility division.

data.title: ADP board declares $1.70/share quarterly dividend; payable on April 1, 2026 to shareholders of record on Mar 13, 2026.
data.description: In Roseland, New Jersey, on January 14, 2026, the board of directors of Automatic Data Processing, Inc. (Nasdaq: ADP) announced a regular quarterly dividend of $1.70 per share. This dividend is set to be paid out on April 1, 2026, to shareholders on record as of March 13, 2026. ADP (Nasdaq: ADP) is known for its leadership in providing innovative business solutions.

data.title: Flex (NASDAQ: FLEX) to report Q3 FY2026 financial results on Feb 4, 2026, with conference call at 7:30 AM CT / 8:30 AM ET.
data.description: Austin, TX - Flex (NASDAQ: FLEX) is scheduled to release its Q3 fiscal year 2026 financial results on February 4, 2026. The announcement will be made before the market opens, followed by a conference call at 7:30 AM CT / 8:30 AM ET on the same day to review the results. Investors are anticipating the details to be shared during this call.

data.title: Meta Platforms will release its Q4 and full year 2025 financial results on Jan 28th, 2026, after market close.
data.description: A technology company based in Menlo Park, California, disclosed on January 14, 2026, that Meta Platforms, Inc. (NASDAQ: META) is set to unveil its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 after the market closes on Wednesday, January 28, 2026. Following the release, Meta intends to conduct a conference call to delve into the details of the results.

data.title: A Case for Women LLC announces winners for "Not Accepting the Status Quo – Women Disruptors Scholarship."
data.description: In Dallas, A Case for Women LLC has released the names of the initial recipients of its "Not Accepting the Status Quo – Women Disruptors Scholarship." This marks a significant milestone for the organization, showcasing its commitment to supporting women in disrupting the norm.

data.title: Coherent's leaders will present at SPIE BiOS and Photonics West 2026, demonstrating expertise in photonics.
data.description: Top executives and technical experts will demonstrate their industry expertise at the SPIE BiOS and Photonics West 2026 events. This gathering will bring together a wealth of knowledge from leaders in the field, with a substantial focus on cutting-edge technologies and innovations. The event is expected to attract a significant number of attendees, with over 15,000 professionals and researchers participating. The showcase will feature a range of presentations and discussions aimed at highlighting the latest advancements in photonics and related industries.

data.title: Arteris acquires Cycuity for cybersecurity tech, enhancing their product portfolio in semiconductors.
data.description: Arteris has successfully completed the acquisition of Cycuity, incorporating semiconductor cybersecurity assurance technology into its range of products. This strategic move is aimed at enhancing Arteris' capabilities in safeguarding its technologies and products. The acquisition has paved the way for an integration of Cycuity's expertise in cybersecurity, thereby bolstering Arteris' position in the market. This acquisition signifies a key milestone for both companies, as it brings together complementary strengths to better serve their customers.

data.title: MidCap Financial Investment Corp (NASDAQ: MFIC) to release Q4/FY 2025 results on Feb 26, 2026, after Nasdaq market closes.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, MidCap Financial Investment Corporation (NASDAQ: MFIC) revealed plans to release its financial results for the quarter concluding on December 31, 2025, following the conclusion of the Nasdaq Global Select Market on Thursday, February 26, 2026.

data.title: GigaCloud Technology Inc appoints Michael Pitman and Scott Hill as vice presidents of sales.
data.description: Today, in El Monte, California, GigaCloud Technology Inc (Nasdaq: GCT) revealed the appointment of Michael Pitman and Scott Hill as vice presidents of sales, marking a strategic move for the Company. GigaCloud specializes in offering advanced B2B technology solutions for large parcel merchandise and is recognized as a key player in the global market. The appointments aim to bolster the sales team and drive business growth. This announcement signifies a significant development for GigaCloud as it continues to expand its reach and solidify its position in the industry.

data.title: Banks concerned about proposed 10% credit card rate cap by President Trump, unsure of implementation.
data.description: The President has reiterated his pledge to limit interest rates, though the specific implementation method remains uncertain.

data.title: AGNC Investment Corp. adds Dr. Morris Davis to its Board effective Jan 12, 2026. He returns after serving from 2008-2025.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, AGNC Investment Corp. based in Bethesda, Maryland, reported that Dr. Morris Davis has been re-elected to its Board of Directors as of January 12, 2026. Dr. Davis had previously been a Board member from May 2008 to March 2025. AGNC Investment Corp. trades on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol AGNC.

data.title: DXC Technology is pleased with the U.S. Appeals Court's decision affirming award in trade secrets case vs. TCS.
data.description: DXC Technology, a prominent enterprise technology and innovation partner, has affirmed its dedication to responsible innovation, ethical practices, and safeguarding intellectual property. This commitment was underscored in a recent ruling, marking a significant moment for the company. The ruling was acknowledged by DXC on Jan. 14, 2026, in Ashburn, VA. As a key player in the industry, listed under NYSE as DXC, the company continues to prioritize these values to drive its operations forward.

data.title: FormFactor will reveal Q4 2025 financial results on Feb 4th at 1:25 pm PT via live webcast. Visit www.formfactor.com.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, FormFactor, Inc. (Nasdaq: FORM) announced that it will disclose its financial performance for the 2025 fiscal fourth quarter on February 4, 2026, at 1:25 p.m. PT in Livermore, California. Interested individuals can tune in to a live webcast of the company's conference call on the Investors page of FormFactor's official website at www.formfactor.com.

data.title: PrairieSky Royalty Ltd. to announce Q4 and year-end 2025 results on Feb 9 after market close. Financials on website/SEDAR.
data.description: PrairieSky Royalty Ltd. will reveal its performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on February 9, 2026, after the market closes in Calgary, Alberta. The announcement will encompass operational and financial data. Comprehensive financial reports, management insights, and annual information will be accessible on PrairieSky's official website at www.prairiesky.com and on SEDAR+ at www.sedarplus.com.

data.title: BridgeBio to issue $750M convertible senior notes due 2033, prefund repayment of $700M notes due 2027, to strengthen balance sheet, lower interest expenses, reduce dilution.
data.description: The purpose of the deal is to bolster the financial standing, decrease interest costs, minimize dilution, and substantially prolong the debt maturity, resulting in significant improvements to the balance sheet.

data.title: Monolithic Power Systems (Nasdaq: MPWR) set to report Q4 and full year 2025 results on Feb 5, 2026 in Switzerland.
data.description: Monolithic Power Systems, Inc. (MPS), a leading global fabless company specializing in high-performance semiconductor power solutions, revealed its intentions to disclose its financial performance for the fourth quarter and entire year concluded on December 31, 2025. The company's stock, listed as MPWR on the Nasdaq, is headquartered in Schaffhausen, Switzerland.

data.title: Symbotic to report Q1 fiscal year 2026 results on Feb 4, 2026 after market close, with live webcast at 5pm ET.
data.description: In Wilmington, Massachusetts, on January 14, 2026, Symbotic Inc. (Nasdaq: SYM) revealed plans to disclose its first quarter fiscal year 2026 financial outcomes post-market close on February 4, 2026. A live webcast has been scheduled for 5:00 p.m. ET on the same day to delve into the quarterly financials. Access to the press release will also be provided on the Symbotic Investor Relations website at www.ir.symbotic.com.

data.title: Terra Balcanica reports 102 g/t Ag Eq over 2.55m at Cumavici Ridge, extending mineralized footprint in Bosnia and Herzegovina.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, Terra Balcanica Resources Corp. (CSE: TERA; FRA: UB1; OTC: TEBAF) has released promising findings from the Phase III drilling at Cumavici Ridge's epithermal vein zone in the Viogor-Zanik project of Bosnia and Herzegovina. The results show high-grade assays, indicating significant mineral potential. The company is delighted to report these initial results, hinting at a lucrative opportunity for exploration and development in the region.

data.title: Belpointe OZ's luxury development in St. Petersburg, Florida, reaches leasing milestone with 25% of units leased.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, Belpointe PREP, LLC (NYSE American: OZ), a qualified opportunity fund known as Belpointe OZ, revealed a notable update regarding its luxury multifamily project, VIV, situated in downtown St. Petersburg, Florida. The company shared that VIV has accomplished a substantial leasing achievement, as 25% of its residential units have been successfully leased.

data.title: John Koudounis to discuss finance & digital assets at World Economic Forum Davos; leads panel at WEF on Jan 19-23, 2026.
data.description: Chicago, on January 14, 2026 - John Koudounis, the President and CEO of Calamos Investments, is set to take part in two significant events at the 56th Annual World Economic Forum in Davos-Klosters, Switzerland, happening from January 19 to 23, 2026. Koudounis will lead a panel session which has already garnered a full capacity of attendees.
